stemHtml: What is the method of operation of a synchroscope for a twin engine aircraft?

options.a: It measures the difference in output frequencies of both alternators (one alternator in each engine).
options.b: It mathematically subtracts RPM values of both engines.
options.c: It mathematically subtracts vibration values of both engines.
options.d: It measures the vibration values of both engines with a piezoelectric sensor.
